news.t: Columbia Threadneedle Investments Launches Six New ETFs Across Equity and Fixed Income

overview.description: The Columbia Corporate Bond ETF (CCRP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that primarily invests in investment grade corporate bonds issued by US and foreign corporations. The fund aims to maintain a duration range of three to ten years. CCRP was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.

data.title: Columbia Threadneedle Investments Launches Six New ETFs Across Equity and Fixed Income
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Columbia Threadneedle Investments today announced the launch of six new exchange-traded funds (ETFs), further expanding its differentiated range of actively managed and Resear...
